label: Standings
description: League standings table with form dots, goal difference, points, and qualification zone colouring.

0.5.note: No mock imports — standings from useSportsData().

0.6.note: Loading guard via Spinner on wsStatus=connecting.

0.8.note: Error guard via destructive msg on wsStatus=error|disconnected.

l0.notes: All 9 checks pass. 0.6/0.8 loading/error guards added in prior pass via wsStatus.

1.1.note: Standings via useSportsData() — no inline fetch.

1.3.note: Standings derived from filters.leagues selection in context memo.

1.4.note: Standings are global league data, no client sub-filter.

1.7.note: MOCK_STANDINGS in context; acceptable until real API.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab and f9f29ea. Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.

3.1.note: Mode relevance: live ✓ (live standings), paper ✓ (same view), batch ✓ (historical standings for completed fixtures). Standings are read-only in all modes.

3.2.note: Context reads useExecutionMode(); no interactive mode-specific behavior in standings.

3.5.note: Paper mode: standings display normally — no trade submission in this widget.

3.6.note: No interval or WebSocket in widget file — uses context wsStatus for loading/error states.

l3.notes: Agent checks 3.1/3.2/3.5/3.6 pass. Human checks 3.3/3.4 pending.

4.1.note: No interactive buttons — read-only table with sorting only.

l4.notes: Agent checks pass. Human checks 4.3/4.4/4.7/4.8 pending: verify column sorting works, scroll within bounds.

5.1.note: Target strategies: sports-betting, sports-arb. Standings provide league context for bet analysis — informational widget supporting strategy decisions.

l5.notes: Agent check 5.1 complete. Human walkthrough pending.

l6.notes: L6 deferred — tests not yet written for sports domain.

7.1.note: text-[var(--pnl-positive)] and text-[var(--pnl-negative)] use design token CSS vars — acceptable token reference pattern. No bare hex colors.

7.4.note: Component PascalCase, file kebab-case. Column defs are module-level constants.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.7.note: Column definitions are module-level stable constants (no inline objects in render). No useMemo/useEffect.

8.1.note: No text-[] fontSize arbitrary values. text-[var(--pnl-positive)] is a CSS var token reference, not a pixel override.

8.3.note: Uses TableWidget shared primitive, LeagueBadge, Spinner — correct use of shared components.

8.4.note: Agent: no img without alt, no interactive div without role. Table uses TableWidget which handles th/td properly. Human: keyboard sort walk pending.

8.5.note: Human-only: resize test at minW=4/minH=5 pending.

keepSeparate.rationale: Pure informational widget — no cross-widget coupling needed.

relationships.notes: Standings filtered by filters.leagues from SportsDataContext — responds to league filter set in sports-fixtures.

dataContract.notes: Standings update infrequently (after match completion). REST polling appropriate. WebSocket wsStatus used only for connection health indicator.

gaps: LEAGUE_MAP only maps EPL — other leagues not explicitly typed; defaults to EPL
Qualification zone colouring not yet implemented
coverage.notes: Read-only informational table. Supports bet decision-making context.

knownIssues: LEAGUE_MAP is EPL-only; will need expanding when more leagues added

findings.description: sports-standings-widget.tsx — loading/error guards missing in prior state
findings.fix: wsStatus-based Spinner (connecting) and error message (error|disconnected) added
Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21
